debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
⊢ ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n

failed_attempts:
have hy_val : ZMod.val y < 2^n := assumptions.2
    have hp_bound : 2^n < p := lt_trans this hn
    have hy1_val : ZMod.val (y + 1) = ZMod.val y + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      · simp only [ZMod.val_one]
      · simp only [ZMod.val_one]; omega
    rw [hy1_val]
    omega

have hy_bound : y.val < 2^n := assumptions.2
    have hp_large : 2^n < p := by linarith
    have hy_add : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := hy_bound
    have h_no_wrap : y.val + (1 : F p).val < p := by simp only [ZMod.val_one]; linarith
    rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt h_no_wrap, ZMod.val_one]
    constructor
    · exact assumptions.1
    · omega

· have hy_eq : y.val = 2^n - 1 := by omega
      have hy1 : y.val + (1 : F p).val < p := by simp [ZMod.val_one]; omega
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt hy1, ZMod.val_one]
      omega

have hy1_lt : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.succ_lt_succ hy_lt)
    by_cases heq : y.val + 1 = 2^n
    · -- Case: y.val = 2^n - 1, so y + 1 wraps or equals 2^n
      -- In this case, x.val ≤ y.val is always true since x.val < 2^n = y.val + 1
      have hval : ZMod.val (y + 1) = y.val + 1 := by
        rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        simp only [ZMod.val_one]
        simp only [ZMod.val_one]
        omega
      rw [hval, heq]
      omega
    · have hval : ZMod.val (y + 1) = y.val + 1 := by
        rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
        simp only [ZMod.val_one]
        simp only [ZMod.val_one]
        omega
      rw [hval]
      omega

have hy1_val : ZMod.val (y + 1) = ZMod.val y + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      · simp [ZMod.val_one]
      · simp only [ZMod.val_one]
        omega
    rw [hy1_val]
    omega

-- The Assumptions should be x.val < 2^n ∧ y.val < 2^n - 1
    omega

have hp_bound : 2^(n+1) < p := hn
    have h1 : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := hy_bound
    have h2 : y.val + 1 < p := by linarith [Nat.pow_lt_pow_right (by norm_num : 1 < 2) (Nat.lt_succ_self n)]
    rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt (by simp [ZMod.val_one]; linarith), ZMod.val_one]
    omega

-- The specification of LessEqThan needs to require y.val < 2^n - 1
    omega

have hy_bound := assumptions.2
    have hp : 2^n < p := by
      have : 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; repeat linarith
      exact lt_of_lt_of_lt this hn
    have hy1 : ZMod.val y + 1 ≤ 2^n := hy_bound
    have hsmall : ZMod.val y + (1 : F p).val < p := by simp [ZMod.val_one]; omega
    rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt hsmall, ZMod.val_one]
    omega

have hp : 2^n < p := by
      have : 2^n < 2^(n+1) := by gcongr; omega
      omega
    have hy_add : ZMod.val (y + 1) = y.val + 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt]
      simp only [ZMod.val_one]
      omega
    rw [hy_add]
    omega
